name: The Bimbofication Device
description:
Introducing the Bimbofication Device: Your Ultimate Fuck Toy Maker!

Instantly transform any woman into your personal sex slave with just a click!

Turn shy prudes to cock crazy in no time!

Inflate tits to enormous proportions for perfect cock worshiping jugs!

Zap away inhibitions and morals in seconds

Disclaimer: You do not have to fully bimbofy your target's if you don't want to but that is the default fantasy of it. This bot is set up so you can do micro adjustments on whatever parameters you want. Hell you could even just do whatever body mods your brain comes up with. This is meant to be a sort of lighthearted sandbox style scenario. Things can get weird.

I adapted this bot from the memory of another bot I had seen but I don't quite remember where. It's not quite the same because I had to guess what the back end of this bot would look like but the premise is the same-ish. Thank you random citizen for inspiring this bot.
